signals.headline: US-Iran Peace Talks Collapse in Pakistan After 21 Hours; Vance, Kushner, Witkoff Announce Failure** | NO | HIGH confiden
signals.raw:
US-Iran Peace Talks Collapse in Pakistan After 21 Hours; Vance, Kushner, Witkoff Announce Failure** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2][3][4]

US Vice President JD Vance, flanked by Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff, confirmed on April 12, 2026, that marathon negotiations with Iran in Islamabad ended without a deal, citing Iran's refusal of US demands like zero uranium enrichment, removal of 400kg of 60% e
